Text:
One single continuous photograph — no panels, grids, or split frames.

Use the uploaded photo as the exact base composition. The street in the source
is empty — populate it with the people and vehicles specified below. Remove all
modern businesses, logos, brands, storefront names, banners, advertisements, and
signage visible in the source image.

PRESERVE (must match source exactly)
- camera: eye-level, facing park, fov 90
- residential road, 1-lane, concrete
- sidewalks absent, curbs absent
- driveways: center; parking: lot
- commercial building at left, 1 story, stucco, brick, glass, metal, flat roof, shallow setback
- commercial building at center, 1 story, concrete, brick, glass, flat roof, shallow setback
- utilities: street lamp, power lines, fire hydrant
- landscape: grass strip, planter, hedge, flower bed
Keep this location instantly recognizable.

OUTPUT FORMAT
Create a TRUE 9:16 vertical portrait image — one single frame. Expand the SAME
scene naturally above (sky) and below (street/pavement) — this is canvas
extension of one photograph, not additional panels. Do not stretch or distort
the source geometry.

TRANSFORM TO 1995
Clinton era prosperity. A 1995 self-serve station — wide canopy over multiple islands, attached convenience store, the first pay-at-pump card readers.

PERIOD DETAILS
- large canopy covering multiple islands
- attached convenience store with lottery and cigarette ads in the glass
- price sign showing gas around $1.15
- main sign: an independent station sign in the style of BP
- window signs: 'CAR WASH $4 WITH FILL-UP', '2 HOT DOGS $2'
- a payphone mounted by the store entrance
- squeegee buckets at the pump islands
Typography: clean geometric sans-serif, early digital influence.
Sign text is only what appears in quotes — do not turn other words from this prompt into signage.

PEOPLE
EXACTLY 6 people, spread out with empty areas.
- a parent and kid walking into the store
- a clerk restocking the ice merchandiser
- an office worker with a pager on his belt
Clothing: men in baggy jeans, windbreakers; women in crop tops, slip dresses. Fashion palette: forest green, maroon, mustard yellow. No posing or eye contact. All people on sidewalks, at storefronts, or beside parked vehicles — the driving lanes stay empty of pedestrians.

VEHICLES
EXACTLY 3 period vehicles, all different:
- 1993-1997 Toyota Corolla — rounded compact sedan — black
- 1994-1998 Ford Mustang — rounded SN95 pony car — hunter green
- 1989-1997 Geo Metro — very small economy hatchback — teal
Parked with gaps; no vehicle newer than 1995.
PLACEMENT: all parked on the RIGHT side with gaps; the first one driving away from the camera in the near lane. No vehicle in the same spot as any other era.

ENVIRONMENT
- road markings: yellow center line, white edge lines, turn lane arrows
- utilities: overhead power lines standard, cable TV and early phone data lines on poles

TREES
- deciduous tree at left: very young sapling
- deciduous tree at background: very young sapling
- conifer tree at right: established tree, modest canopy
Tree sizes MUST follow this specification even where they differ from the source photo.

PHOTOGRAPHIC STYLE
COLOR photograph — Kodak Gold 200 or Fujifilm Superia 200 look.
Color: neutral to slightly warm tones. Grain: fine grain, cleaner than 1985.
Photorealistic — NOT black-and-white, no HDR.

PRIVACY
Blur all faces and license plates.
SelectedVehicles: 1994-1998 Ford Mustang — rounded SN95 pony car
1989-1997 Geo Metro — very small economy hatchback
